violations.claim: Bug: classify() searches backward: sat → unsat → unknown
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3 - Calling Context Analysis
; LINE: 32
; Bug: classify() searches backward: sat → unsat → unknown
; If output has "unsat" on line 1 and "sat" on line 2, backward search finds "sat" first
; Model: Last line index where each keyword appears

(declare-const sat_line Int)
(declare-const unsat_line Int)
; Z3 output: "unsat" appears at line index 1, "sat" appears at line index 2
(assert (= sat_line 2))
(assert (= unsat_line 1))
; backward loop: for (i = lines.length - 1; i >= 0; i--)
; At i=2: lines[2] == "sat" → returns "sat" immediately
; But Z3 actually said UNSAT - this is a violation misclassification
(assert (> sat_line unsat_line))
(check-sat)
